name: opencode-pilot
description: Remote control dashboard for Codex sessions — monitor, send prompts, approve permissions, get notifications.

interface.shortDescription: Remote control for your Codex sessions
interface.longDescription: Monitor sessions, approve permissions, send prompts, and receive push/Telegram notifications — all from a browser dashboard or your phone. Requires opencode-pilot HTTP server running locally (install via `npm i -g @lesquel/opencode-pilot` and run `opencode`).
defaultPrompt: Configure my Codex hooks for opencode-pilot
Check pilot status and dashboard URL
